requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — SANS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——SANS IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——SANS IEC 62133

summary.en: South Africa references SANS IEC 62133, the national adoption of IEC 62133 (Part 2 covers lithium systems: SANS IEC 62133-2), as the recognised safety standard for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and battery packs. The standard covers abuse and mechanical testing (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical safety limits. Where the product or its host appliance is covered by an NRCS Compulsory Specification, conformity to the referenced SANS standard must be demonstrated through accredited test reports as part of the Letter of Authority (LOA) application. Test reports under the IEC system (for example IECEE CB Scheme reports to IEC 62133-2) are commonly used to support the SANS-referenced evidence because SANS IEC 62133 mirrors the IEC text.
summary.zh: 南非引用SANS IEC 62133，即IEC 62133的国家采用版（第2部分涵盖锂系统：SANS IEC 62133-2），作为便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池组的公认安全标准。该标准涵盖滥用与机械测试（过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学安全限值。当产品或其载体器具被NRCS强制规范覆盖时，须通过认可的测试报告证明符合所引用的SANS标准，作为许可证（LOA）申请的一部分。由于SANS IEC 62133与IEC文本一致，IEC体系下的测试报告（例如依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB方案报告）常用于支持SANS引用的证据。
summary.zht: 南非引用SANS IEC 62133，即IEC 62133的國家採用版（第2部分涵蓋鋰系統：SANS IEC 62133-2），作為便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池組的公認安全標準。該標準涵蓋濫用與機械測試（過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學安全限值。當產品或其載體器具被NRCS強制規範覆蓋時，須透過認可的測試報告證明符合所引用的SANS標準，作為許可證（LOA）申請的一部分。由於SANS IEC 62133與IEC文本一致，IEC體系下的測試報告（例如依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB方案報告）常用於支持SANS引用的證據。

standards_or_laws: SANS IEC 62133-2 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (national adoption of IEC 62133-2)
National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act 5 of 2008 — Letter of Authority where a Compulsory Specification applies

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment), with GB 18287 for mobile phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report issued by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is not automatically equivalent to a SANS IEC 62133-2 report, and is not by itself accepted for an NRCS Letter of Authority where a Compulsory Specification applies. An IECEE CB report to IEC 62133-2 is generally more portable into the SANS-referenced route than a GB-only report.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池则适用GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依GB 31241出具的报告，不自动等同于SANS IEC 62133-2报告，在适用强制规范时也不被单独接受用于NRCS许可证（LOA）。依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB报告，通常比仅有GB的报告更易转入SANS引用路径。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池則適用GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依GB 31241出具的報告，不自動等同於SANS IEC 62133-2報告，在適用強制規範時也不被單獨接受用於NRCS許可證（LOA）。依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB報告，通常比僅有GB的報告更易轉入SANS引用路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Because SANS IEC 62133-2 mirrors the IEC standard, the cleanest path for Chinese exporters is to hold an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 62133-2 that can map to the SANS adoption, rather than relying solely on a GB 31241 report. Key gaps: (1) GB 31241 contains national deviations and is not directly recognised in the SANS-referenced route; (2) where a Compulsory Specification applies, the safety evidence must be presented as part of an NRCS Letter of Authority application via a South African importer; (3) test sample, marking, and documentation must align with the SANS/IEC text rather than the GB text. Exporters should confirm whether their product or host appliance triggers a VC and prepare IEC 62133-2 evidence accordingly.
gap.zh: 由于SANS IEC 62133-2与IEC标准一致，中国出口商最清晰的路径是持有可对应SANS采用版的IEC 62133-2 IECEE CB方案报告，而非仅依赖GB 31241报告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241含国家偏差，在SANS引用路径中不被直接认可；（2）适用强制规范时，安全证据须通过南非进口商作为NRCS许可证（LOA）申请的一部分提交；（3）测试样品、标识及文件须与SANS/IEC文本而非GB文本对齐。出口商应确认其产品或载体器具是否触发VC，并据此准备IEC 62133-2证据。
gap.zht: 由於SANS IEC 62133-2與IEC標準一致，中國出口商最清晰的路徑是持有可對應SANS採用版的IEC 62133-2 IECEE CB方案報告，而非僅依賴GB 31241報告。主要差距：（1）GB 31241含國家偏差，在SANS引用路徑中不被直接認可；（2）適用強制規範時，安全證據須透過南非進口商作為NRCS許可證（LOA）申請的一部分提交；（3）測試樣品、標識及文件須與SANS/IEC文本而非GB文本對齊。出口商應確認其產品或載體器具是否觸發VC，並據此準備IEC 62133-2證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — SANS IEC 62133-2 conformity must be demonstrated where the product or host appliance is covered by an NRCS Compulsory Specification requiring a Letter of Authority; otherwise SANS IEC 62133-2 is the recognised reference standard used to evidence safety
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Africa recognises SANS IEC 62133-2 (its adoption of IEC 62133-2) for portable lithium cell and pack safety. Where a Compulsory Specification applies, this evidence supports the NRCS Letter of Authority application made through a South African importer. Chinese GB 31241 reports are not directly recognised because of national deviations; an IECEE CB report to IEC 62133-2 is the more portable basis. Exporters should confirm VC coverage and prepare IEC 62133-2 evidence rather than relying on a GB-only test report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非便携式锂电芯及电池组安全认可SANS IEC 62133-2（其对IEC 62133-2的采用版）。当适用强制规范时，该证据用于支持通过南非进口商提交的NRCS许可证（LOA）申请。中国GB 31241报告因国家偏差不被直接认可；依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB报告是更易转用的基础。出口商应确认VC覆盖情况并准备IEC 62133-2证据，而非仅依赖GB测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非便攜式鋰電芯及電池組安全認可SANS IEC 62133-2（其對IEC 62133-2的採用版）。當適用強制規範時，該證據用於支持透過南非進口商提交的NRCS許可證（LOA）申請。中國GB 31241報告因國家偏差不被直接認可；依IEC 62133-2出具的IECEE CB報告是更易轉用的基礎。出口商應確認VC覆蓋情況並準備IEC 62133-2證據，而非僅依賴GB測試報告。

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa
